policy.requiredDisclosureKo: 이 포스팅은 쿠팡 파트너스 활동의 일환으로, 이에 따른 일정액의 수수료를 제공받습니다.
notes: Only approved channels may display Coupang Partners links or banners.
Treat this registry as the Coupang exposure allowlist; domains not listed here must be blocked.
Mark a channel as registered after adding it in Coupang Partners My Page.
Mark a channel as approved only after the approval screenshot has been uploaded and accepted.
Unregistered-channel promotion can be treated as invalid or abusive activity.
Guide 2026-06-11: final approval review starts after cumulative sales reach 150,000 KRW.
Guide 2026-06-11: performance may be tracked before final approval, but settlement and Partners API use require final approval.
Guide 2026-06-11: approval screenshots should show the active link/widget/banner and the economic relationship disclosure in the same registered channel.
Registered channels may be served only with purpose=approval_screenshot until approved; public exposure stays blocked.

channels.firstUse: 생활건강, 위생용품, 건강기능식품. 의약품/치료 효능 문구 금지
